Hi, I'm

Lusanda Sentane

I work at Standard Bank and I Create Better Experience For Users People.
H i r e M e

I Don’t Just Design Screens.

I’m a Senior Product Designer with 6+ years of experience turning complex problems into clean, scalable, and user-friendly solutions.

I believe design should do more than look good, it should work hard. That’s why I design with clear goals, measurable outcomes, and the end user always in mind.

If it doesn’t solve a real problem, it’s not design. It’s decoration.

B o o k n o w R e s u m e

Latest Works

I am specialized in launching products and services. I enhance your product by creating fluid and ergonomic interfaces so that they are adapted to your users. Ease of use and consistency are my goals.

My Combination

When I build your product, I use the perfect combination of my skills and experience..

UX Research

Skilled in both qualitative and quantitative UX research methodologies.

UI Design

I design apps, websites, dashboards, and more.

User Testing

Remote testing, lab testing, guerrilla testing, and other methods—to ensure seamless and effective user experiences

Prototyping

Creating interactive prototypes to bring designs to life and test functionality.

My methodology

If you are looking at blank cassettes on the web, you may be very confused at the difference in price. You may see some for as low as R279,82 each.

01 To explore

I put myself in the place of your users in order to understand their needs.

We define together the framework of the experience and will begin to formalize the user journey.

02 Imagine

We will generate several ideas to solve our problems.

We will design and create an interactive prototype.

We will work along and clarify your marketing strategy.

03 Test

We will analyze the prototype with real users in order to optimize and validate the solution.

I get to work and create your website, checking in with you throughout the process.

04 Deploy

Once the prototype has been validated. We can develop, launch and promote the product.

I walk you through your product,teach you how to make updates.

Jamie Chisholm

Design Lead at DVT

"Lusanda is one of the most enthusiastic and professional designers I have ever come across. His ability to both accept and learn from criticism is exceptional, allowing him to be extremely dynamic in his field.

He is well versed in design philosophy and draws upon a wealth of knowledge to ensure best practices are always followed. He is also able to articulate himself in meetings with stakeholders, and presents himself with an excellent level of communication. I highly recommend him to anyone."

Genevieve Chang

Senior UX/UI Designer at DVT

"Lusanda has the most positive attitude of any designer I've ever worked with. He always has a huge smile on his face and a genuinely awesome outlook towards everything.

His curious nature means that he is constantly learning and applying himself in all aspects of UX/UI and is a brilliant source of inspiration for UX books, podcasts and tutorials. He has an impeccable work ethic and highly dependable and enthusiastic to help out his fellow colleagues in an instant."

Washington Tomu

ETD/ETQA Practitioner, Columbus Consulting

"Beyond his work in artistic direction, his methodology, his organization and his personal investment allowed me to work with him with confidence, bringing an indisputable added value on all of my projects

I'm infinitely appreciative. Thanks!"

Asiphezi Vellem

CEO, Gugu Mayo

"Lusanda has an immediate grasp of the scope of any project, and is quick to identify potential complications so they can be addressed in the planning stage.

A strategic thinker who cares a lot about business goals and objectives."
